name: explainer-video
description: Create animated, camera-zooming product explainer videos with voiceover, music, and synced sound effects. Interactive end-to-end skill, plus focused sub-skills: smooth-render (non-choppy HTML→MP4), kinetic-typography (animated headlines/cracked word), vo-sync (word-timestamp cue sync), and audio-stems (separate music/SFX/VO tracks).
